problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
hypothesis: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Lattice-based. Lattice-based cryptography for quantum resistance directly addresses this.
